hero_headline: We built a robot that fetches your books.
hero_sub: 같이Go is an autonomous library delivery system built at Inha University — TurtleBot 3 + ROS 2, delivering books directly to students.
how_subtitle: From request to delivery in minutes — fully autonomous.
step1_desc: Pick a book in the app and submit your request in seconds.
step2_desc: ROS 2 path-planning moves TurtleBot 3 directly to the shelf.
step3_desc: Robot arrives at your floor. Status updates live via WebSocket.
robot_sub: A fully autonomous mobile robot running ROS 2 Humble, navigating the library stacks with LiDAR-based SLAM and delivering books with a fixed gripper.
tech_subtitle: Hardware meets software — a full-stack robotics system.
team_subtitle: Eight students, one robot, one mission.
uni_name: Department of Computer Engineering, Inha University
cta_headline: Ready to borrow your first book?
cta_sub: Search the library catalog and request delivery in under a minute.
demo_title: Built to prove library delivery from request to pickup
pricing_subtitle: A complete deployment package for any institution.
pricing_tier1_desc: One-time hardware purchase per deployment unit
pricing_tier2_desc: Core platform powering the full delivery lifecycle and management layer
pricing_tier3_desc: Annual subscription — keeps the system current and supported
pricing_footer: All tiers can be combined into a full deployment package. Contact us for institutional pricing.
hero_borrow_tag: Borrow to desk · Purchase to reception
hero_feat1_desc: Browse the catalog by title, author, category, and availability.
hero_feat2_desc: Borrowed books are routed toward student desk coordinates.
hero_feat3_desc: A TurtleBot 3 delivery flow connects requests, inventory, and tracking.
hero_feat4_desc: Purchased books move through reception instead of desk delivery.
hero_feat5_desc: Book availability and request state stay connected to the backend flow.
hero_feat6_desc: Search, request, and track books without learning library operations.
architecture_title: From book request to robot delivery
architecture_desc: 같이Go architecture diagram for the end-to-end prototype flow.
prototype_description: 같이Go uses a TurtleBot-based prototype to test how a student book request can become a real robot task. The goal is not to claim production deployment, but to validate the core delivery loop for a capstone demo.
prototype_scope_note: These figures describe the current prototype scope, not commercial deployment metrics.
